nasb.text: There was cedar on the house within, carved in the shape of gourds and open flowers; all was cedar, there was no stone seen.

esv.text: The cedar within the house was carved in the form of gourds and open flowers. All was cedar; no stone was seen.

cnv.text: 殿的內部都貼上香柏木，上面刻有匏瓜和初開的花朵，全部都是香柏木，一塊石頭都看不見。

ccb.text: 殿内全部铺上香柏木，不露一点石头，香柏木上刻着野瓜和花朵的图案。
